_doc: State file written by the Fireflies → PPL Dash auto-ingest scheduled task. Tracks which transcripts have been processed so re-runs are idempotent. Do not edit by hand unless you know what you're doing.
lastRunMessage: Ingested GL4 (id 01KQ11RQGTTD1TVDJNDZ3TXQMZ, 2026-04-24, ~104 min). Generated lesson seed (with 25 homework items), 28-card sparknotes chapter (METARs · Runway numbering · Hazardous attitudes · Runway incursions · Movement areas), and 16-question quiz. SW cache v17→v18. Decisions made autonomously: (a) GL2-titled-as-'Principles of Flight' transcript still skipped per task spec — title doesn't match strict ^Ground lesson N regex; (b) duration rounded to 1.7 hr (103.91 min); (c) noted Tenerife fatality figure as ~583 (Desireé said 538 in transcript — corrected to historically accurate ~583 in study material); (d) cited transcript verbatim where Desireé emphasized testable phrasing.
